metadata.description: Synthetic phishing email training data for ML classifier development
metadata.feature_notes: Each email is annotated with persuasion tactics (urgency, authority, fear, reward, curiosity, scarcity) and structural indicators (spoofed_sender, suspicious_url, generic_greeting, grammar_errors, requests_credentials, requests_financial_info, threatening_tone, embedded_link, attachment_reference) for supervised learning.

emails.subject: Action Required: Unusual Sign-In Activity on Your Account
emails.body:
Dear Customer,

We detected an unusual sign-in attempt on your Microsoft account from an unrecognized device in Moscow, Russia on April 12, 2026 at 3:42 AM.

If this wasn't you, your account may be compromised. Please verify your identity immediately by clicking the secure link below:

https://account-verify.micros0ft-secure.com/auth/login

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily locked for your protection.

Thank you,
Microsoft Account Security Team

This is an automated message. Please do not reply directly to this email.

emails.subject: Your PayPal Account Has Been Limited – Immediate Action Needed
emails.body:
Dear Valued PayPal User,

We've noticed some irregularities with your recent transactions. As a result, we have placed a temporary limitation on your account.

You will not be able to send or receive payments until you confirm your information.

To restore full access, please update your account details here:

https://www.paypa1-resolve.com/account/update

Please complete this step within 48 hours to avoid permanent suspension of your account.

Sincerely,
PayPal Resolution Center
Ref: PP-009-481-227

emails.subject: Fraud Alert: Unauthorized Transaction on Your Chase Account
emails.body:
Dear Chase Customer,

We have identified a suspicious transaction on your Chase debit card ending in **4892**:

  Amount: $1,247.89
  Merchant: ELECTRONICS INTL - LAGOS, NG
  Date: April 13, 2026

If you did not authorize this transaction, you must report it immediately to prevent further charges.

Click here to dispute this transaction:
https://chase-secure-alerts.com/fraud/dispute?ref=TX8847123

If you do not respond within 12 hours, we will assume the transaction was authorized.

Chase Fraud Protection Department
1-800-XXX-XXXX

emails.subject: FedEx: Delivery Failed – Package Requires Address Confirmation
emails.body:
Hello,

We attempted to deliver your package (Tracking #: 7892-4410-3387) today but were unable to complete delivery due to an incomplete address on file.

To reschedule delivery, please confirm your shipping details and pay the redelivery fee of $2.99:

https://fedex-redelivery.track-pkg.com/confirm

If we do not hear from you within 5 business days, the package will be returned to the sender.

Thank you for choosing FedEx.

FedEx Customer Support
Tracking ID: FX-20260414-8837

emails.subject: Urgent: Wire Transfer Needed Before End of Day
emails.body:
Hi Sarah,

I'm currently in a meeting and can't talk right now, but I need you to process a wire transfer urgently. We need to pay an overseas vendor before their bank closes today.

Amount: $38,500.00
Beneficiary: Nexgen Supplies Ltd.
Bank: First Continental Bank
Account: 2891-00447-3321
Routing: 091000019
Reference: INV-2026-0414

Please process this immediately and confirm once done. I'll explain the details when I'm out of this meeting.

Thanks,
David Chen
CEO, Company Corp

Sent from my iPhone

emails.subject: Congratulations! You've Been Selected as a Google Annual Prize Winner!
emails.body:
Dear Lucky Winner,

We are pleased to inform you that your email address was randomly selected in the Google Annual E-mail Promotion held on April 10th, 2026. You have won a cash prize of $450,000.00 USD!

To claim your prize, please reply with the following information:

1. Full Name
2. Mailing Address
3. Phone Number
4. Date of Birth
5. Occupation

You will also need to pay a one-time processing fee of $150.00 via gift card to release your winnings.

Please respond within 7 days or your prize will be forfeited and awarded to an alternate winner.

Congratulations once again!

Mrs. Patricia Holmes
Google Online Promotions Coordinator
Ref Code: GGL/WIN/2026/0887

emails.subject: IRS Notice: You Have a Pending Tax Refund of $1,382.00
emails.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

After reviewing your most recent tax filing, the Internal Revenue Service has determined that you are eligible for a tax refund in the amount of $1,382.00.

This refund has not yet been processed because the banking information on file is outdated.

To receive your refund, please verify your identity and update your direct deposit information through our secure portal:

https://irs-refund-claim.taxportal-gov.com/verify

Please note: Failure to verify your information within 10 business days will result in the forfeiture of your refund for the current tax year.

Internal Revenue Service
Refund Processing Division
Case ID: IRS-2026-RF-44190

This communication contains taxpayer confidential information.

emails.subject: Jennifer Martinez shared a document with you: "Q2 Budget Review - CONFIDENTIAL"
emails.body:
Jennifer Martinez (j.martinez@partner-firm.com) has shared a document with you.

Document: Q2 Budget Review - CONFIDENTIAL.xlsx
Message from Jennifer: "Hey, please take a look at the updated numbers when you get a chance and let me know your thoughts before the Friday meeting."

Open in Google Docs:
https://docs.google-drive-sharing.com/d/1BxR4mN7pQ2/view?usp=sharing

You will need to sign in with your Google account to view this document.

This invitation was sent to user@example.com. If you do not wish to receive these emails, you may adjust your notification settings.

emails.subject: Your Apple ID Has Been Locked Due to a Security Concern
emails.body:
Dear Apple Customer,

Your Apple ID (user@example.com) has been locked because someone attempted to sign in from a new device.

Details of the attempt:
  Date: April 13, 2026, 11:58 PM
  Device: Windows PC
  Location: Bucharest, Romania
  IP Address: 185.220.101.44

If this was not you, your account may have been compromised. Please unlock your account and reset your password immediately:

https://appleid.app1e-verify-support.com/unlock

If you believe this sign-in was legitimate, you may disregard this message.

Apple Support
Apple ID | Support | Privacy Policy

emails.subject: OVERDUE: Invoice #INV-20260331 – Payment Required Immediately
emails.body:
Dear Accounts Payable,

This is a final reminder that Invoice #INV-20260331 for $12,750.00 is now 14 days past due.

Original Due Date: March 31, 2026
Amount Due: $12,750.00
Late Fee (if unpaid by April 18): $637.50

Please find the invoice attached for your records. To avoid additional late fees and potential service interruption, remit payment immediately via the link below:

https://vendorpay-solutions.com/invoice/pay?id=INV20260331&token=a8f3e2

If payment has already been sent, please disregard this notice and forward your remittance confirmation to billing@vendorpay-solutions.com.

Regards,
Accounts Receivable Department
VendorPay Solutions
Phone: (312) 555-0199

[ATTACHMENT: Invoice_INV-20260331.pdf.exe]
